description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test suite that runs on push to master and 4.0-dev branches and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: pyright, test, and coveralls. The pyright job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, caches pip dependencies, installs dependencies, and runs pyright. The test job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, caches pip dependencies, installs dependencies, and runs tests with pytest and coverage. The coveralls job runs on ubuntu-latest, finishes the Coveralls report, and uploads the results.
